title: 2023 Urgent Care Industry White Paper: The Essential Nature of Urgent Care in the Healthcare Ecosystem Post-COVID-19
expected_content_elements: Cover page with title, date, and publisher (Urgent Care Association)
Sections on utilization, center counts, visit volumes, and trends
key_details: Analyzes how urgent care utilization surged during and after COVID-19.
Provides statistics on number of urgent care centers, visit volumes, and growth trends.
Argues that urgent care is now essential to the healthcare ecosystem yet often under-recognized in funding/reimbursement.
semantic_themes: Policy and funding context for urgent care
layout_features: Report-style layout with headings, subheadings, and footers.
Multi-page narrative with embedded charts and callout boxes.
images_and_diagrams_description: Multiple charts (bar/line graphs) compare urgent care utilization and center counts over time; some charts show relationships between urgent care availability and ER visits.
tables_description: Few formal tables; most quantitative information appears in charts or inline figures.
extraction_checklist: Is the table of contents correctly separated from body text?
Are all headings captured with correct levels to reconstruct the report outline?
Are chart captions and any axis labels extracted (if text-based)?
Are key statistics (percent increases, counts of centers, visit numbers) captured from the main text?
Are footnotes/endnotes linked to their references?
